COMMENT.NOTICE_01_01: Children are passengers aged 6-12. Youth are passengers aged 13-18.
COMMENT.NOTICE_01_02: The discount will be applied within 3 business days after registration.
COMMENT.NOTICE_02: After registering your card as a member, you can view transaction history and income tax deduction records.
COMMENT.NOTICE_03:
The information of the actual card user is required and will be used exclusively for the purpose of discount registration.
 Any liability arising from falsely registering a card not owned by the user shall rest solely with the card user. Adults using a child or youth card without paying the required fare may be charged a penalty fare of up to 30 times the fare for the distance traveled, in addition to the applicable fare for the traveling section. This is in accordance with the Railroad Service Act and the Punishment of Minor Offense Act.
COMMENT.INFORMATION: About CU Rail+ Card & Toss Youth Card
COMMENT.INFORMATION_01: For CU Rail+ Cards, register the date of birth in the CU convenience store to apply child and youth discounts.
COMMENT.INFORMATION_02: Please visit the nearest CU convenience store to receive fare discounts.
COMMENT.INFORMATION_03: For Toss Youth Cards, fare discounts are automatically applied upon issuance.
COMMENT.GUIDE_01: Registering the card will allow you to receive continuous fare discounts on public transportation (bus, subway).
COMMENT.GUIDE_02: Register the card within 10 days of its first use

DISCOUNT_PAGE.PAGE_SUB_TITLE: To apply child/youth discounts, please enter the Rail+ Card number and date of birth.

INQUIRY_PAGE.WARNING_DATE_OF_BIRTH: Not eligible for discounts. Please verify your date of birth.
INQUIRY_PAGE.NO_REGISTERED: No results found. Please check your information and try again.

COMPLETED_PAGE.WANNA_CANCEL_TITLE: Would you like to cancel the discount?
COMPLETED_PAGE.WANNA_CANCEL_DESCRIPTION: The discount will no longer be applied after cancellation.

REGISTRATION_PAGE.WARNING_DATE_OF_BIRTH: Not eligible for discounts. Please verify your date of birth.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.SUCCESS_DESCRIPTION: The discount will be applied within 3 business days.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.REG_ERR_NEED_CARD_TOSS: Toss Youth Cards do not require additional registration. Discounted fares are automatically applied upon issuance.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.REG_ERR_NEED_CARD_UNAVAILABLE: This card cannot be registered. Please contact customer service.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.REG_ERR_NEED_CARD_SAFE: This card is not eligible for Child/Youth discount registration.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.REG_ERR_NEED_CARD_ADULT: Only children and youth are eligible to register the card.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.REG_ERR_NEED_CARD_UNDER_SIX: Children under the age of 6 are not eligible for card registration
REGISTRATION_PAGE.REG_ERR_NEED_BIRTH_UNAVAILABLE: Please check your date of birth.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.REG_ERR_NEED_CARD_BLOCK: This card has been suspended. Please contact customer service.
REGISTRATION_PAGE.TERM_PII_TITLE: Consent to Personal Information Collection and Use

HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.CATCHPHRASE_DETAIL:
Rail+ is a prepaid and rechargeable public transportation card issued by KORAIL.
This one card is good on all forms of public transportation including subways, buses, trains,
and even expressways.
HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.RECHARGE_SUB_01: You can recharge your card up to KRW 500,000.
HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.REFUND_SUB_01: The remaining balance on a valid card can be refunded at major KORAIL stations.
HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.REFUND_SUB_02: The refund balance may incur a slight fee.
HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.REFUND_SUB_03: The refund balance will not be refunded in cases of negligence or theft.
HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.PROCESS_02:
Sign up or 
continue without 
signing in
HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.DISCOUNT_FOR_SUB_01: Registration for youth or child discounts must be m ade within 10 days of the first charge.
HOW_TO_USE_PAGE.DISCOUNT_FOR_SUB_02: The standard fare will be applied thereafter.
